creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
heimdal is one of the last ports to install catpages, hopefully in 1.5.2 (thanks
for upgrade) we can bypass this. Once this patch is accepted, an ugly part of
bsd.port.mk (cat detection) will be able to go away.

Port maintainer (Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_5 (mode: change, diff: CVS)
